description_blurb:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.

Narrative Description: The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a simplified central crosshair. Two small, dark, circular objects are visible near the center of the frame. This narrative description is provided for informational purposes only. Readers should not interpret any part of this description as reflecting an analytical judgment, investigative conclusion, or factual determination regarding the described event’s validity, nature, or significance.
title: FBI Photo B17
summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set. The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a simplified central crosshair, showing two small, dark, circular objects near the center of the frame.
bust_reasoning: The document provides extremely minimal information: a title, a timestamp, and a generic description of 'two small, dark, circular objects' with no described behavior or kinematics. There are no corroborating sensors or detailed witness accounts. This lack of information makes it impossible to rule out common photographic artifacts or easily misidentified mundane objects, placing it firmly in the highest bust score category.
cover_up_reasoning: The document is almost entirely redacted, with only the title 'FBI Photo B17' and a timestamp visible. The complete redaction of all descriptive and contextual information related to the photo indicates an extreme level of concealment, preventing any meaningful assessment of the incident.
summary_zh: 联邦调查局 (FBI) 于2025年向全域异常现象解决办公室 (AARO) 提交了一份关于未识别异常现象 (UAP) 的报告，其中包含一张源自美国军事系统的静止图像。原始图像在提交给 AARO 之前经过了编辑和涂黑处理。未提供随附任务报告。操作员报告称无法明确识别该 UAP。由于系统日期/时间未设置，图像中的日期不正确。该单色图像显示出颗粒状纹理和简化的中心十字线，画面中心附近显示有两个小型、黑暗的圆形物体。
reported_object_description_zh: 两个小型、黑暗的圆形物体
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件提供的信息极其有限：一个标题、一个时间戳，以及对“两个小型、黑暗的圆形物体”的笼统描述，未提及任何行为或运动学特征。没有佐证传感器数据或详细目击者证词。这种信息匮乏使得无法排除常见的摄影伪影或易于误识别的普通物体，因此将其归入最高“虚假报告”评分类别。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件几乎完全涂黑，仅标题“联邦调查局照片 B17”和时间戳可见。照片所有描述性及背景信息的完全涂黑表明了极高的隐瞒程度，阻碍了对该事件进行任何有意义的评估。
claims: FBI submitted UAP report to AARO
Report includes a redacted still image from a U.S. military system
Operator unable to positively identify the UAP
Image shows two small, dark, circular objects
claims_zh: 联邦调查局向 AARO 提交了 UAP 报告
报告包含一张来自美国军事系统的涂黑静止图像
操作员无法明确识别 UAP
图像显示两个小型、黑暗的圆形物体
bust_explanations: Lens flare or camera artifact, given the generic description of 'small, dark, circular objects' and the lack of any contextual information or kinematics.
Bird, bat, or insect at close range, which can appear as small, dark, circular blurs in photos, especially if out of focus.
Consumer drone, appearing as small, dark objects, with no described behavior to rule out a mundane flight path.
bust_explanations_zh: 镜头光晕或相机伪影，鉴于对“小型、黑暗的圆形物体”的笼统描述以及缺乏任何背景信息或运动学特征。
近距离的鸟类、蝙蝠或昆虫，在照片中可能显示为小型、黑暗的圆形模糊物，尤其是在失焦时。
消费级无人机，表现为小型、黑暗的物体，未描述任何行为以排除普通飞行路径。
cover_up_indicators: Nearly 100% of the document text is redacted, apart from the title and timestamp.
All descriptive information about the photo's content and context is withheld.
cover_up_indicators_zh: 文件文本几乎100%被涂黑，除了标题和时间戳。
关于照片内容和背景的所有描述性信息均被扣留。
